title: perytis concentrica
intro: Perytis concentrica, also known as Indian daisy or garland chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species native to India and China. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Perytis concentrica include relief from fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tincture, and infusions, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
